stemHtml: The carriage of weapons on a civil aviation aircraft is only allowed under certain conditions. Which of the following is a condition that permits a weapon to be carried on board?

options.a: When it is unloaded and kept separate from its ammunition and stowed in a place inaccessible to any person during the flight.
options.b: When carried by in-flight security-officers without authorisation.
options.d: When carried by a flight crew member, provided he/she holds a valid firearms permit.
